title: skopeo sync not support aliyun registry
body:
login
```
xxx@cloudshell:~$ sudo skopeo login   registry.cn-shenzhen.aliyuncs.com --username=xxx@outlook.com --password=123456
Login Succeeded!
```
sync failed
```
xxx@cloudshell:~$ sudo skopeo sync --src docker --dest docker quay.io/cephcsi/cephcsi:v3.1.0 registry.cn-shenzhen.aliyuncs.com/cnmirror/csi-provisioner
INFO[0000] Tag presence check                            imagename="quay.io/cephcsi/cephcsi:v3.1.0" tagged=true
INFO[0000] Copying image ref 1/1                         from="docker://quay.io/cephcsi/cephcsi:v3.1.0" to="docker://registry.cn-shenzhen.aliyuncs.com/cnmirror/csi-provisioner/cephcsi:v3.1.0"
Getting image source signatures



Copying blob 6910e5a164f7 [--------------------------------------] 0.0b / 71.4MiB
Copying blob f2c704ca28e9 [--------------------------------------] 0.0b / 16.8MiB
Copying blob 90161ff7470d [--------------------------------------] 0.0b / 236.4MiB
FATA[0005] Error copying ref "docker://quay.io/cephcsi/cephcsi:v3.1.0": Error writing blob: Error initiating layer upload to /v2/cnmirror/csi-provisioner/cephcsi/blobs/uploads/ in registry.cn-shenzhen.aliyuncs.com: errors:
denied: requested access to the resource is denied
unauthorized: authentication required
```

comments.body:
Thanks for your report.

I’m afraid there’s no way to tell for me from the above whether it is a code problem (and if so, what to do about it) or a missing permission (and if so, how to fix that).

First, please double-check that the destination in `to="docker://registry.cn-shenzhen.aliyuncs.com/cnmirror/csi-provisioner/cephcsi:v3.1.0"` is as expected, and that the user does have the permissions to use that repo. `skopeo sync`’s repo mapping is not necessarily intuitive. After that … I don’t know.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

resolved by this, delete dest csi-provisioner

```
root@VM-20-2-ubuntu:~# skopeo sync --src docker --dest docker quay.io/cephcsi/cephcsi:v3.1.0 registry.cn-shenzhen.aliyuncs.com/cnmirror
INFO[0000] Tag presence check                            imagename="quay.io/cephcsi/cephcsi:v3.1.0" tagged=true
INFO[0000] Copying image ref 1/1                         from="docker://quay.io/cephcsi/cephcsi:v3.1.0" to="docker://registry.cn-shenzhen.aliyuncs.com/cnmirror/cephcsi:v3.1.0"
Getting image source signatures
Skipping: image already present at destination
INFO[0004] Synced 1 images from 1 sources 
```
